title: Lead Instructional Designer at Aakash Educational Services

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Aakash Educational Services
jsonLd.description:
Join the Aakash Educational Services family as a Instructional Designer in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Aakash Educational Services:
Aakash Educational Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aakash Educational Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
